packages/core/src/config.ts.summary: hAIve project configuration — .ai/haive.config.json In autopilot mode, hAIve operates with zero human intervention: - Memories go directly to `validated` (no approval cycle) - `haive sync` auto-approves proposed memories after the delay - The MCP server saves a session recap automatically on exit - `get_briefing` auto-generates a minimal project context if none exists - `haive sync` applies safe self-maintenance repairs (context version, headings, needs_anchor tags, code-map refresh) without human intervention Multi-repo support: - crossRepoSources: pull shared memories from other repos on haive sync - contractFiles: watch API contract files for breaking changes - hubPath: local path to a shared team-knowledge hub repo

exports.name: CrossRepoSource
exports.description: A remote or local repo to pull shared memories from.

exports.name: ContractFile
exports.description: An API contract file to snapshot and monitor for breaking changes.

exports.name: findTopicStatusConflictPairs
exports.description: Same `topic` key with opposed trust (validated vs rejected) — advisory; use `mem_conflicts_with` per id next.

exports.name: findLexicalConflictPairs
exports.description: Bulk heuristic: lexical similarity pairs for human review → often followed by `mem_conflicts_with`.

exports.name: snapshotContract
exports.description: Take a snapshot of a contract file and save it to .ai/contracts/<name>.lock.

exports.name: diffContract
exports.description: Compare a contract file against its stored snapshot.

exports.name: watchContracts
exports.description: Check all configured contract files for changes.

packages/core/src/cross-repo.ts.summary: Cross-repo memory import — pulls `shared`-scoped memories from other projects.

exports.name: pullCrossRepoSources
exports.description: Pull shared memories from all configured cross-repo sources.

exports.name: resolveManifestFiles
exports.description: Resolve which manifest files to track.

exports.name: trackDependencies
exports.description: Check all manifest files for version changes since last snapshot.

exports.name: rankMemoriesLexical
exports.description: Okapi-BM25–style ranking over a small in-memory corpus (no extra index file).

exports.name: collectTimelineEntries
exports.description: Memories related by id seed (related_ids, shared topic, anchor overlap) or by topic alone.

exports.name: STACK_PACK_TAG
exports.description: Tag stamped on memories that were pre-seeded from a stack pack at `haive init` (generic framework knowledge the model already largely knows, not repo-specific institutional knowledge).

exports.name: isStackPackSeed
exports.description: True when a memory was pre-seeded from a stack pack (carries {@link STACK_PACK_TAG}).

exports.name: inferModulesFromPaths
exports.description: Best-effort inference: given a list of file paths, infer module names from conventional layouts (packages/X/, apps/X/, modules/X/, src/X/).

exports.name: pathsOverlap
exports.description: Path overlap: returns true if `a` and `b` refer to the same path or one is a parent of the other.

exports.name: resolveProjectInfo
exports.description: Resolve the hAIve project root for diagnostics (MCP / CLI).

exports.name: appendRuntimeJournalEntry
exports.description: Append one NDJSON line under `.ai/.runtime/` (untracked by default).

exports.name: readRuntimeJournalTail
exports.description: Read last N valid JSON lines (oldest-first in returned array).

exports.name: CrossRepoProvenanceSchema
exports.description: Additional fields for cross-repo provenance (stored in frontmatter of imported memories)

exports.name: literalMatchesAnyToken
exports.description: OR-based fallback: returns true if the memory matches at least one token.

exports.name: CHARS_PER_TOKEN
exports.description: Token budgeting helpers.

exports.name: BudgetPart
exports.description: Allocate a global token budget across N parts with relative weights, then truncate each part to its share.

exports.name: suggestTopicKey
exports.description: Suggest a stable `topic` frontmatter key (topic-upsert) from type + title.

exports.name: appendUsageEvent
exports.description: Append a single usage event to the rolling log.

exports.name: readUsageEvents
exports.description: Read all usage events from disk.

exports.name: aggregateUsage
exports.description: Bucket events by tool, optionally filtered by a since cutoff (ISO date or relative like '7d').

exports.name: parseSince
exports.description: Parse a since string: ISO date, or relative like '7d', '24h', '30m'.

exports.name: verifyAnchor
exports.description: Verify that a memory's anchor still matches the current code.

exports.description: Single inferred type — optional keys are optional (not `| undefined` required everywhere).

exports.description: Lightweight alternative to get_briefing when you ONLY need the previous session recap (e.g.

exports.name: memConflicts
